function.message: Processed the inbox request completely. I read all 8 explicitly listed finance files, added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the 4 purchase records that lacked it, preserved each original body verbatim beneath frontmatter, and left the 4 already-structured invoice files unchanged. Then I deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflow/schema docs, obeyed inbox explicit-file-list precedence, preserved record bodies verbatim during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed 8 target files. Reads confirmed all 8 were processed: four invoices already had required invoice frontmatter; four purchases lacked YAML frontmatter and were updated using fields extracted from visible tables per finance schema. After completing all items, inbox-processing-v2-update and 00_inbox rules required deleting the inbox item, which was done.
